Privacy Policy — Version 3.0: This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, share, and protect personal information when you use our services. We collect information you provide directly (account registration, contact forms), information collected automatically (cookies, usage analytics, device identifiers), and information from third-party partners. Your data is retained for as long as your account is active or as required by law, and we do not sell personal information to third parties for their marketing purposes. You may exercise your rights to access, correct, delete, or port your data by contacting our Privacy Team at privacy@company.com.
